title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, where the rising stars of the
age gather to compete. Of course, the worthy foe
who challenged me for the Satsuki crown is in
attendance.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
With one look at the fire in her eyes, I sense a
potential ally in my quest to overthrow the
Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I shall see if that fighting spirit is
genuine!
